🫀 Peripheral InterventionREF: MO35P✓ Brochure Verified

Mozec PEB PTA

Mozec · Balloon Catheters

The MOZEC PEB PTA is a Paclitaxel Eluting PTA Balloon Catheter designed on the navigable Mozec PTA platform. It features proprietary drug adhesion technology and offers balloon lengths up to 120mm, allowing for the treatment of long lesions with a single balloon to optimize procedure outcomes.

MaterialPaclitaxel (Drug)
WhatsApp Quote

Mozec PEB PTA

Technical Blueprint SpecificationClinical Value
Drug Dosage
3 µg/mm
Usable Catheter Length
80 cm & 135 cm
Max. Guidewire Compatibility
0.035"
Balloon Diameter (mm)
3.00, 4.00, 5.00, 6.00, 7.00, 8.00, 9.00 & 10.00 mm
Balloon Length (mm)
30, 40, 50, 60, 80 & 120 mm
Min. Sheath Compatibility
5 Fr to 8 Fr
Balloon RO Markers
2 - Platinum/Iridium
Shaft Diameter
5 Fr
Nominal Pressure (NP)
6-7 atm
Rated Burst Pressure (RBP)
11-14 atm

Catheter System

Over-the-wire (OTW)

Drug Type

Paclitaxel

Primary Material

Paclitaxel (Drug)

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

Paclitaxel Eluting Balloon for Percutaneous Transluminal Angioplasty with proprietary drug adhesion technology and enhanced navigation capabilities

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences Pvt. Ltd. and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Mozec PEB PTA, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Mozec PEB PTA is constructed using Paclitaxel (Drug), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
